task_description:
【强制执行模式】以下任务必须实际执行，不要只描述或规划。你必须使用 write_file、run_shell 等工具动作来完成任务。禁止只输出文字分析。

原始任务：设计一个《无畏契约》(Valorant) 战绩分析网页的主页设计图 (PNG)。要求：1) 设计整体风格要符合无畏契约游戏的科幻/电竞风格，配色用深色系+蓝色/紫色高光；2) 主页需要包含：顶部导航栏、玩家基本信息卡片、近期战绩统计、排名分布图表、代理人使用数据；3) 图片格式为 PNG，尺寸 1920x1080，保存到 ~/Desktop/ 目录。

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import random
import math

# 创建 1920x1080 的 PNG 图片
width, height = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深蓝色背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img, 'RGBA')

# 定义配色
DARK_BG = '#0a0e27'
NAV_BG = '#1a1f3a'
CARD_BG = '#151b2f'
ACCENT_BLUE = '#00d4ff'
ACCENT_PURPLE = '#a855f7'
TEXT_WHITE = '#ffffff'
TEXT_GRAY = '#b0b0b0'
GRADE_GOLD = '#ffd700'

# ========== 1. 顶部导航栏 ==========
nav_height = 80
# 导航栏背景
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, nav_height)], fill=NAV_BG)
# 导航栏高亮线
draw.rectangle([(0, nav_height-2), (width, nav_height)], fill=ACCENT_BLUE)

# Logo/标题文字（简化版，用矩形模拟）
draw.rectangle([(40, 20), (150, 60)], outline=ACCENT_PURPLE, width=2)
draw.text((50, 32), "VALORANT", fill=ACCENT_PURPLE, font=None)

# 导航菜单项
menu_items = ["首页", "战绩", "排名", "代理人", "设置"]
menu_x = 300
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 32), item, fill=TEXT_WHITE, font=None)
    menu_x += 150

# 右侧用户名/登出
draw.text((1700, 32), "玩家昵称", fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)

# ========== 2. 玩家基本信息卡片 (左侧) ==========
card_x, card_y = 40, 120
card_width, card_height = 380, 320

# 卡片背景
draw.rectangle([(card_x, card_y), (card_x+card_width, card_y+card_height)], fill=CARD_BG, outline=ACCENT_PURPLE, width=2)

# 头像区域（圆形）
avatar_x, avatar_y = card_x + 40, card_y + 30
avatar_size = 80
draw.ellipse([(avatar_x, avatar_y), (avatar_x+avatar_size, avatar_y+avatar_size)], fill=ACCENT_BLUE, outline=ACCENT_PURPLE, width=2)
draw.text((avatar_x+15, avatar_y+25), "AVATAR", fill=DARK_BG, font=None)

# 玩家信息
info_x = avatar_x + avatar_size + 20
draw.text((info_x, avatar_y+5), "玩家昵称", fill=TEXT_WHITE, font=None)
draw.text((info_x, avatar_y+35), "等级: Diamond", fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)
draw.text((info_x, avatar_y+60), "RR: 78", fill=ACCENT_PURPLE, font=None)

# 分隔线
draw.line([(card_x+20, card_y+130), (card_x+card_width-20, card_y+130)], fill=ACCENT_BLUE, width=1)

# 统计信息
stats_y = card_y + 150
stats = [
    ("总场数", "128"),
    ("胜率", "62.5%"),
    ("K/D", "1.24"),
    ("ACS", "187")
]
for i, (label, value) in enumerate(stats):
    row_y = stats_y + i * 40
    draw.text((card_x+30, row_y), label, fill=TEXT_GRAY, font=None)
    draw.text((card_x+150, row_y), value, fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)

# ========== 3. 近期战绩统计 (中上) ==========
stats_card_x, stats_card_y = 450, 120
stats_card_width, stats_card_height = 550, 320

draw.rectangle([(stats_card_x, stats_card_y), (stats_card_x+stats_card_width, stats_card_y+stats_card_height)], fill=CARD_BG, outline=ACCENT_BLUE, width=2)

# 标题
draw.text((stats_card_x+20, stats_card_y+15), "近期战绩 (最近10场)", fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)

# 战绩条纹（模拟10场比赛）
match_start_y = stats_card_y + 50
match_width = (stats_card_width - 40) // 10
for i in range(10):
    match_x = stats_card_x + 20 + i * match_width
    # 随机胜负
    is_win = random.choice([True, False])
    color = '#00ff00' if is_win else '#ff4444'
    draw.rectangle([(match_x, match_start_y), (match_x+match_width-5, match_start_y+80)], fill=color, outline=ACCENT_PURPLE, width=1)
    draw.text((match_x+10, match_start_y+30), "W" if is_win else "L", fill=DARK_BG, font=None)

# 统计数据展示
stats_display_y = match_start_y + 120
draw.text((stats_card_x+20, stats_display_y), "总杀敌: 287 | 总死亡: 156 | 平均击杀: 3.2", fill=TEXT_GRAY, font=None)
draw.text((stats_card_x+20, stats_display_y+35), "胜场: 6 | 负场: 4 | 胜率: 60%", fill=TEXT_GRAY, font=None)

# ========== 4. 排名分布图表 (右侧上) ==========
rank_card_x, rank_card_y = 1020, 120
rank_card_width, rank_card_height = 380, 320

draw.rectangle([(rank_card_x, rank_card_y), (rank_card_x+rank_card_width, rank_card_y+rank_card_height)], fill=CARD_BG, outline=ACCENT_PURPLE, width=2)

draw.text((rank_card_x+20, rank_card_y+15), "排名分布", fill=ACCENT_PURPLE, font=None)

# 排名等级条形图（简化）
ranks = [("Iron", 5), ("Bronze", 12), ("Silver", 28), ("Gold", 35), ("Platinum", 15), ("Diamond", 5)]
rank_start_y = rank_card_y + 60
max_matches = 35

for i, (rank_name, matches) in enumerate(ranks):
    y = rank_start_y + i * 35
    bar_width = int((matches / max_matches) * 250)
    draw.text((rank_card_x+20, y), rank_name, fill=TEXT_GRAY, font=None)
    # 根据排名着色
    colors = [ACCENT_BLUE, ACCENT_BLUE, ACCENT_BLUE, GRADE_GOLD, ACCENT_PURPLE, ACCENT_PURPLE]
    draw.rectangle([(rank_card_x+100, y), (rank_card_x+100+bar_width, y+20)], fill=colors[i])
    draw.text((rank_card_x+100+bar_width+10, y), str(matches), fill=TEXT_WHITE, font=None)

# ========== 5. 代理人使用数据 (下半部分) ==========
agent_card_x, agent_card_y = 40, 470
agent_card_width = width - 80
agent_card_height = 560

draw.rectangle([(agent_card_x, agent_card_y), (agent_card_x+agent_card_width, agent_card_y+agent_card_height)], fill=CARD_BG, outline=ACCENT_BLUE, width=2)

draw.text((agent_card_x+20, agent_card_y+15), "代理人使用数据", fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)

# 代理人网格展示 (3x3 布局)
agents = [
    ("Jett", 89, 68.5, "#e8b44a"),
    ("Sage", 76, 71.2, "#5fdb7f"),
    ("Phoenix", 65, 65.8, "#ff6b35"),
    ("Omen", 54, 62.1, "#a855f7"),
    ("Sova", 43, 59.3, "#00d4ff"),
    ("Killjoy", 38, 58.7, "#ffdd00"),
    ("Reyna", 31, 61.2, "#ff1493"),
    ("Breach", 25, 56.4, "#ff4444"),
    ("Raze", 19, 54.9, "#ffaa00")
]

agent_box_size = 200
agent_spacing = 40
agent_start_y = agent_card_y + 60

for idx, (name, picks, winrate, color) in enumerate(agents):
    row = idx // 3
    col = idx % 3
    x = agent_card_x + 60 + col * (agent_box_size + agent_spacing)
    y = agent_start_y + row * (agent_box_size + agent_spacing)
    
    # 代理人卡片
    draw.rectangle([(x, y), (x+agent_box_size, y+agent_box_size)], fill=CARD_BG, outline=color, width=2)
    
    # 代理人名字
    draw.text((x+30, y+20), name, fill=TEXT_WHITE, font=None)
    
    # 选用次数
    draw.text((x+15, y+70), f"选用: {picks}", fill=ACCENT_BLUE, font=None)
    
    # 胜率
    draw.text((x+15, y+110), f"胜率: {winrate}%", fill=color, font=None)
    
    # 胜率条
    bar_width = int(agent_box_size * 0.8 * (winrate / 100))
    draw.rectangle([(x+15, y+150), (x+15+bar_width, y+160)], fill=color)
    draw.rectangle([(x+15, y+150), (x+15+agent_box_size*0.8, y+160)], outline=TEXT_GRAY, width=1)

# ========== 6. 底部装饰线和水印 ==========
draw.rectangle([(0, height-4), (width, height)], fill=ACCENT_BLUE)
draw.text((width-400, height-40), "Valorant Stats Analysis | 2026", fill=TEXT_GRAY, font=None)

# 保存图片
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_stats_dashboard.png'
img.save(output_path, 'PNG')
print(f"设计图已生成并保存到: {output_path}")
print(f"图片尺寸: {width}x{height}")
print(f"风格: 深色系 + 蓝紫高光 | 电竞科幻风格")
print(f"包含内容: 导航栏 + 玩家信息 + 战绩统计 + 排名分布 + 代理人数据")

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 用户要求设计一个 Valorant 战绩分析网页的主页设计图（PNG 格式）。这是一个完整的设计执行任务。我需要使用 Python（结合 PIL、matplotlib 等库）直接生成符合要求的设计图：深色系+蓝紫高光、包含导航栏/玩家信息/战绩统计/排名图表/代理人数据，尺寸 1920x1080，保存到 /Users/lzz/Desktop。我是 Designer Duck，应该直接用 create_and_run_script 执行，而不是描述。
